---
title: Projects
listing:
  contents: projects/*/index.qmd
  type: grid
  max-description-length: 250
  categories: false
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  image-height: "200"
toc: false
title-block-banner: false
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    css: styles.scss
---
